verses.text: Mailam hunah Topa' biakinn a omna mual, a sangpen mual hong suak ding a, minam tampi in hong zuan ding uh hi

Minam tampite hong pai-in, “Israel mite' Pasian' biakinn, Topa' mualah va paito ni. Tua lai-ah ama deihna hong hilh ding a, ama deihna bangin i gamta ding hi,” ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion panin thuhilhna hong gingkhia a, Jerusalem panin Topa' thu hong paikhia hi

Amah in minam tampite' thu khensak ding a, Israel gam panin a gamla pekah a om, minam vangliante' thu khensak ding hi. Amaute in a namsaute uh lokhawhna tu-in seek ding uh a, a teipite uh singhiang heuhna temkawi-in seek ding uh hi. Minam khatlekhat kido nawnlo ding uh a, galkidona theikha nawnlo ding uh hi
A kuamah peuh lungnuamin a leenggui phung leh a theikung nuai-ah tu hithiat ding a, kuamah in patausak nawnlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa mahmah in hih thu hong gen khinta hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte in amau' pasian ciat bia-in a thu mang ding uh a, ahi zongin eite in ahih leh eima Topa Pasian mah a tawntungin bia-in ama thu i mang ding hi.
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Keimah in gim ka piak ahi, sala om gimna a thuak mite, ka kaihkhop kik hun hong tung ding hi
Amaute, a cimawhin gamlapi-ah om uh a, ahi zongin keimah in amaute pansa kikin, minam vanglian khatin ka bawlkik ding hi. Tua huna kipan a tawntungin Zion mual panin amaute ka uk paisuak ding hi
Pasian in a mite a etna Jerusalem khuapi aw, nidanga na vangliatna na ngahkik ding a, kumpi khuapi na suakkik ding hi
Bang hangin tu-in nakpi takin kap a, numei nausuak ding bangin na sa na hi hiam? Kumpi neilo a, na thulamlakte si ahi hiam

Jerusalem khuamite aw, numei nausuak ding bangin na tha uh san un. Tu-in kumpi khuapi nusia-in, gamsung khua-ah a teng ding na hita uh a, Babylon khuapi a zuan ta ding na hi uh hi. Ahi zongin tua lai panin note hong kihonkhia-in, na galte uh khutsung panin Topa in hong khahkhia ding hi
Note a hong sim dingin minam tampi hong kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in, “Jerusalem kisusia ding a, i mit in hih khuapi a siasa-in mu ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin hih minamte in Topa' lungsim tawng theilo uh a, ancilna phualah anphalte kaihkhop bangin amaute kaikhawmin, a cilgawp ding ahihlam phawklo uh hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Jerusalem khuamite aw, kipan un la, na galte uh sugawp un. Sumngo khe leh sik ki a nei bawngtal bangin note kong thahatsak ding hi. Minam tampite na sugawpzo ding uh a, amau' neihsa teng keima-a' na suaksak ding uh a, amau' hauhna teng leitung buppi' Topa' neihsa na suaksak ding uh hi.
